headline: Margie Ratliff
image_alt_text: A social card featuring verified Hush Line user Margie Ratliff, their bio, their tip line URL, and a QR code that links to the same URL.

social.bluesky:
🤩 Verified Member Highlight!

Margie Ratliff founded the Documentary Participants' Empowerment Alliance, which brings resources to documentary participants. She is a producer and participant in Subject and a participant in The Staircase.

Send Margie a tip: https://tips.hushline.app/to/IsaThing

subtext: Margie Ratliff is the Founder of the Documentary Participants’ Empowerment Alliance (DPEA), which brings vital resources to documentary participants. She is a producer/participant in the film Subject and a participant in the film The Staircase.
